introduction: SYNOPSISDischarged philosophy professor Kim Jin-woo is a talented man who is smarter than the people around him. Professor Kim grew up under unfortunate circumstances. Due to the mental pressure and stress from his childhood, he shows signs of schizophrenia. He thinks of himself as a speeding horse on a racetrack. Worried about these symptoms, Jin-woo and his wife, Hi-young, go to a psychologist named Hyun-woo. Hyun-woo does his best as a friend. But he is unable to hide his surprise as Jin-woo's past is revealed. Hyun-woo tells Hee-young of Jin-woo's home. Watching Jin-woo's pain, Hi-young falls into great sadness and finally kills herself. Hyun-woo grows resentment towards Jin-woo due to Hi-young's death.故事被解雇的哲学教授金瑾佑是一位优秀的学者。他认为精神分裂症是由于精神压力和压力在不利的环境下造成的，认为他是一匹失控的马。担心和忧虑这个症状，金宇和他的妻子熙英去精神科医生贤宇和玄宇玩朋友。但是，对于金宇过去的故事，玄宇感到惊讶，向常青报告了金宇的地位。喜洋以自己忧心忡忡的表情深深地自杀，玄宇因死亡而对金宇怀恨在心。
